check: Read n8n release notes for target version and all skipped versions
pass_signal: Risk notes, breaking changes, deprecated nodes, and migration notes are recorded
required_action: Do not upgrade until release notes are reviewed

check: Classify upgrade as patch, minor, or major
pass_signal: Change ticket names previous version, target version, and risk class
required_action: Pause and classify risk before touching production

check: Pin n8n image to an explicit tag
pass_signal: docker compose config shows docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:<version>
fail_signal: Compose uses floating latest or unverified tag
required_action: Edit compose.yaml to use a pinned version tag

pass_signal: database.dump exists and pg_restore -l can inspect it
required_action: Stop upgrade and rerun backup

pass_signal: n8n_data.tgz, caddy_data.tgz, and caddy_config.tgz exist and tar can list them
required_action: Stop upgrade and rerun volume archive

pass_signal: n8n-encryption-key.txt matches production key and chmod is owner-only
fail_signal: Key is missing or not verified
required_action: Stop upgrade until key is verified

pass_signal: compose.yaml, .env, Caddyfile, and docker-compose.rendered.yaml are in backup set
fail_signal: Config missing or rendered compose absent
required_action: Stop upgrade and export config

pass_signal: shasum -a 256 -c passes after transfer
required_action: Treat backup as invalid

check: Run isolated restore drill before production update
pass_signal: n8n starts in restore project, workflows visible, credentials decrypt
required_action: Do not upgrade production

pass_signal: docker compose pull n8n succeeds and image digest is recorded
fail_signal: Pull fails or pulls unexpected image
required_action: Do not restart production
evidence: docker compose images or image inspect

check: Recreate n8n service without deleting volumes
pass_signal: docker compose up -d n8n succeeds and services remain running
fail_signal: Service fails or command used down -v
required_action: Rollback or restore depending on damage

pass_signal: Editor loads and login works
required_action: Inspect logs and rollback if unresolved

pass_signal: Workflow list opens and credentials show no decryption error
required_action: Check database restore and encryption key, rollback if needed

pass_signal: Manual execution succeeds
required_action: Inspect node error and rollback if production risk exists

check: Test public webhook and proxy URL
pass_signal: Webhook uses expected HTTPS URL and not localhost
fail_signal: Webhook URL is localhost, old domain, or fails
required_action: Fix WEBHOOK_URL, N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL, N8N_PROXY_HOPS, proxy config

pass_signal: No migration, encryption, database, permission, or proxy fatal error
required_action: Rollback or full restore based on error type

check: Watch latency, failed executions, and restarts
pass_signal: Metrics stay within pre-update baseline
required_action: Rollback before change window closes

check: Rollback by repinning previous image tag
pass_signal: Previous pinned tag starts and smoke tests pass
fail_signal: Previous image cannot run against migrated DB
required_action: Use full restore from backup set

check: Use full restore when image rollback is insufficient
pass_signal: Database, volumes, encryption key, and config are restored from backup
required_action: Escalate incident and preserve failed state for diagnosis

pass_signal: Release log includes version, image digest, backup id, restore drill result, smoke tests, and rollback decision
required_action: Keep change window open until evidence is complete
